name: mc_sentinel_blast_radius_eligible_pool_boundary
description: Pins the exact raw-day boundary at which run_monte_carlo transitions from sentinel to a valid float. The eligible pool is raw_days - (MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS - 1). Sufficiency requires eligible_days >= MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS. Minimum raw history = MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS + (MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS - 1) = 20 + 19 = 39 days. See project memory project_mc_eligible_pool_vs_raw_day_boundary.
provenance: Schema-derived. Raw day counts are derived from MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS and MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS constants read at test time. No producer-computed probability is pinned.

boundary_cases.description: 38 raw days: eligible_days = 38 - 19 = 19 < MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS (20). Must return sentinel.
39 raw days: eligible_days = 39 - 19 = 20 = MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS. Must return a float in [0.0, 100.0].

20 raw days (the old MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS threshold, pre-eligible-pool fix): eligible_days = 20 - 19 = 1 < MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS (20). Must return sentinel — NOT the old in-band 100.0. Pins that the pre-fix fail-dangerous behavior is gone.

derivation: minimum_raw_days = MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS + (MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS - 1), read from math_engine at test time. The boundary is inclusive: minimum_raw_days returns a valid float; minimum_raw_days - 1 returns the sentinel.
